title: Are Aliens Just Future Humans?
summary: This interview discusses the hypothesis that UFO encounters may represent interactions with future humans rather than extraterrestrial beings. The discussion covers how the observed behavior of UFOs (disappearing and reappearing) may not align with traditional extraterrestrial craft theories, and mentions the possibility of AI involvement.

acronyms.definition: A form of machine intelligence; suggested as a possible nature of the beings associated with UFO encounters

key_claims.claim: UFO behavior of disappearing and reappearing does not accord with the traditional extraterrestrial craft hypothesis
Steven Dick, a NASA historian of 40 years, suggested more than 20 years ago that UFO-related beings could be a form of AI
Craft retrieval claims support the extraterrestrial hypothesis
